\n        self.pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 1))\\n        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(\\n            nn.Flatten(),\\n            nn.Linear(c2, FC_HIDDEN),\\n            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),\\n            nn.Dropout(DROPOUT_RATE),\\n            nn.Linear(FC_HIDDEN, NUM_CLASSES),\\n        )\\n\\n    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:\\n        x = self.stem(x)\\n        x = self.blocks(x)\\n        x = self.pool(x)\\n        return self.classifier(x)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"layout\",\"rationale\":\"Promote the micro ResNet from a single same-resolution block stack to a two-stage residual network with learned projection shortcuts and one stride-2 transition.
